prestazioni: Engine: 4.2L V8 (CAUA) with a custom APR Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GT3076R turbos, upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Supporting mods include a 1000cc ID1000 fuel injectors, Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pump, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe with a Vibrant GESI 4-inch cat-back exhaust system.

Drivetrain: 0B5 7-speed S tronic transmission with a Sachs Performance Stage 3 clutch kit and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lockup) for improved power delivery. The transmission is paired with a custom TCU tune from Alientech to reduce shift lag and enable launch control at 4,500 RPM.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and preload), H&R Monoball front subframe bushings, and a full polyurethane bushing kit from 034 Motorsport. Braking is upgraded with Alcon 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (356mm rotors), paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and a 20mm overfenders to accommodate 10.5-inch front and 11.5-inch rear wheels. The rear wing is a custom 1-piece carbon fiber GT-style spoiler from Seibon Carbon with adjustable angle of attack.

Wheels & Tires: Forged BBS LM-R wheels in 9.5x19 ET30 (front) and 11x19 ET25 (rear) with custom gold PCD adapters to fit the S5 bolt pattern. Tires are Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R in 275/30/19 (front) and 305/30/19 (rear) for maximum grip.

Interior & Exterior: Full carbon fiber interior trim from Varis Japan, including door cards, center console, and dashboard inserts. Seats are Recaro Pole Position II with custom red Alcantara and black leather upholstery. Exterior features a custom matte Nardo Grey wrap with gloss black accents, LED taillights from Tru-Image, and a custom carbon fiber engine cover with a clear polycarbonate window to showcase the turbo setup.
